name: Etherscan
description: Query native balances and normal transaction histories across Etherscan-supported EVM networks.

auth.hint: Create an Etherscan API V2 key and send it in the apikey query parameter.

tools.name: get_native_balance
tools.description: Retrieve the native token balance for an address on one supported network.

params.name: chainid
params.description: One supported chain ID, such as 1 for Ethereum or 8453 for Base.

params.name: module
params.description: API module; set this to account.

params.name: action
params.description: API action; set this to balance.

params.name: tag
params.description: Use latest for the current balance, or a hexadecimal block number within the latest 128 blocks.

tools.name: list_normal_transactions
tools.description: List normal transactions for an address on one supported network.

params.name: chainid
params.description: One supported chain ID, such as 1 for Ethereum or 42161 for Arbitrum One.

params.name: module
params.description: API module; set this to account.

params.name: action
params.description: API action; set this to txlist.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort direction: asc for oldest first or desc for newest first.

tools.name: get_contract_execution_status
tools.description: Retrieve the execution status and error description for a contract transaction.

params.name: module
params.description: API module; set this to transaction.

params.name: action
params.description: API action; set this to getstatus.
